---
title: Notes on Footnotes
status: draft
---
# Notes on Footnotes

The first claim has a note.[^1] A second claim has another.[^2]

The second paragraph reorders nothing, but includes **normal bold text**.

[^1]: A note with **bold**, *italic*, `code`, and a [link](https://example.com).
[^2]: A short second note.
[^orphan]: This definition has no reference and must survive untouched.
